name: Popeye's Favorite Snack
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Seasoned stuffing mix (crushed to crumbs)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cook spinach according to package directions and drain well.
3. Combine spinach with remaining ingredients, mixing well.
4. Roll into walnut-sized balls.
5. Bake on an ungreased cookie sheet at 350°F for 20 minutes.
6. These can be frozen before cooking. Without thawing, bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
7. Serve hot or cold.
